description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default image $CI_IMAGE (derived from CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE) with the docker:dind service, docker tags, and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 and GOROOT=/usr/local/go variables. Add a prepare‑stage job named "build ci image" that runs on the docker:git image, triggers only for branches matching the regex /\Adocker-ci-image\/.*@tmaczukin\/hanging-droplets-cleaner/, installs make and bash via apk and then executes "make release_ci_image". In the test stage, add a "codequality" job that runs "make codequality", sets CODEQUALIT_VERSION=0.71.0 together with the DOCKER_* variables, uses docker:dind, and stores codeclimate.json as a 1‑week artifact; also add a "race conditions detector" job that runs "make check_race_conditions" with the same service and variables, and two unit‑test jobs – "unit tests" running "make race_test" and "unit tests (no race)" running "make test" – both producing coverprofile.html, coverprofile.txt and coverprofile.func.txt as 1‑week artifacts. Include a build‑stage "compile" job that runs "make compile" and publishes the gcp-exporter binary as a 7‑day artifact. Finally, add a release‑stage "release image" job that runs only on the master branch or tags, executes "make release_image", and uses docker:dind with the Docker variables.
